sourcesContent:
import React, { useEffect } from 'react'; import { updateSeo } from '../../utils/seoHelper'; import styles from '../PrivacyPolicy/PrivacyPolicy.module.css'; // Reusing the same professional styles function TermsAndConditions() { useEffect(() => { updateSeo({ title: 'Terms & Conditions - Kognivex', description: 'Review the terms and conditions for using Kognivex services and website. Professional IT service terms for our clients.', }); window.scrollTo(0, 0); }, []); return (

Terms & Conditions

Last Updated: April 27, 2026

1. Introduction

Welcome to Kognivex. These Terms & Conditions govern your use of our website and the services provided by Kognivex. By accessing or using our Services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

2. Acceptance of Terms

By using our website, you confirm that you accept these Terms & Conditions and that you agree to comply with them. If you do not agree to these terms, you must not use our website or services.

3. Services

Kognivex provides professional IT services including, but not limited to:

  • Custom Web Development
  • SaaS & Software Solutions
  • Digital Transformation Services
  • Cloud & DevOps Consulting

4. User Responsibilities

As a user of our platform, you agree to:

  • Provide accurate and complete information when requested.
  • Maintain the confidentiality of any account credentials.
  • Not use the platform for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.
  • Not attempt to interfere with the proper working of the Services.

5. Intellectual Property

All content, branding, designs, and materials on this website and delivered as part of our services are the exclusive property of Kognivex or its licensors. You may not reuse, reproduce, or distribute any materials without our express written permission.

6. Payments & Services

For project-based services:

  • Pricing is determined based on the specific scope of each project.
  • Payment terms, milestones, and schedules will be agreed upon in individual project contracts.
  • Late payments may result in suspension of services or additional charges.

7. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Kognivex shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of or in connection with the use of our services or website.

8. Termination

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to our Services at any time, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms or is harmful to other users or our business interests.

9. Third-Party Links

Our website may contain links to third-party websites or services that are not owned or controlled by Kognivex. We have no control over, and assume no responsibility for, the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party websites.

10. Changes to Terms

We may update our Terms & Conditions from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Terms on this page. Your continued use of the platform after such changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

11. Governing Law

These Terms & Conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of **India**. Any disputes arising under these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Hyderabad, Telangana.

12. Contact Information

If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:

Kognivex IT Solutions

Hyderabad, Telangana, India

Email: support@kognivex.com

); } // Internal style fix for section mapping if needed, but since I'm reusing the CSS module it should be fine. const sectionStyles = styles; export default TermsAndConditions;
